observation.images.exterior_1_left.comment: DROID exterior camera 1 (left stereo channel) — slot names are the DROID dataset's own keys. float32 [0,1] CHW; the policy resizes to 224x224 internally. No wrist slot: the pretrain consumed the two exterior views only.

observation.text.comment: Task instruction, formatted into the Qwen3-VL prompt template; required by the VLA.

action.delta_eef_pose.comment: DROID flat 'action' arm dims: 6-DoF cartesian command pre-normalized to [-1,1] in the dataset (translation + euler-XYZ rotation rates; units 'none' because the dataset values are velocity-controller commands clipped to [-1,1], not raw m / rad). OPEN: exact controller semantics (cartesian_velocity command vs per-step pose delta, and the base-frame assumption) taken from the DROID RLDS spec, not verified against starVLA's OXE data pipeline.

action.gripper.comment: Trained in [0,1] (DROID gripper_position; action.mask=0 excludes it from MIN_MAX). The shared vla_jepa postprocessor binarizes 1-2*(g>0.5) to {-1,+1}. OPEN: DROID's convention is 1=closed (Robotiq), the opposite of the Bridge/LIBERO '1=open' the binarize step was written for — verify the sign (and consider bypassing the binarize step) before driving a real/sim DROID rig with this.

comment: VLA-JEPA pretrain checkpoint (arXiv:2602.10098): JEPA latent-world-model pretraining on Something-Something-v2 (220K human videos, no actions) + action supervision on DROID (76K trajectories). This is the base the LIBERO/SimplerEnv finetunes start from — its primary use is FINETUNING, not zero-shot eval. NO proprio at inference: input_features is image-only (vestigial 8-dim state stats [pos(3), euler(3), pad, gripper] sit unused in the normalizer). No env in this repo pairs with it: robolab (Isaac DROID) serves joint-space control while this emits the DROID flat cartesian action — no spec yaml ships for it. chunk_size 7; control_rate 15 = DROID's native rate. Requires a lerobot build with policies/vla_jepa (git main, not 0.5.x).
